Dashboard Archive: 2026-03-20 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Long-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns from 1 month to 10 years, with relative performance vs SPY over 1y/5y/10y. Same scoring engine as the short-term ranker but optimized for longer investment horizons and secular trends.
Today's Reading
LINC is dominating the long-term momentum rankings with a rank of 1 and score of 95.9, showing extraordinary returns across all timeframes—1321.69% over 10 years, 494.92% over 5 years, and 148.68% over 1 year—while significantly outperforming SPY by 1099.55% over the decade. The stock passes 4 out of 5 ratio thresholds and trades above all major moving averages (30/50/100/200), with a "clean" momentum signal and "strong_buy" flag indicating sustained upward pressure. CF ranks second with a more modest profile, posting 256.2% 10-year returns but lagging SPY by 34.06% over that same period, suggesting it has underperformed the broader market despite positive absolute gains. The gap between LINC's outperformance (+1099.55% vs SPY 10y) and CF's underperformance (-34.06% vs SPY 10y) reveals a stark divergence in secular trend strength between these two momentum leaders.
For educational and informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results.

Click column headers to sort  |  Score = percentile composite: returns + ratio passes + bad-SPY resilience  |  SMA ✓ = price above all SMAs (30/50/100/200)  |  Ratio = short-term momentum consistency (out of 5 tests)  |  M = momentum signal (sortable) —  ● clean  ● stalling  ● overextended  |  V = volume confirmation (sortable) —  ● confirmed  ● normal  ○ thin  |  PB = entry timing: down day on strong stock (sortable by 1d return) —  ● buy today  ○ none  |  OL = theme overlap vs owned tickers —  ● overlap  ○ clear
